tasks.title: Verify backup, load, and export functionality
tasks.description: Ensure that the core data maintenance functions (backup to zip, load from zip, and CSV export) are working correctly.
tasks.verification_method: Run existing export/import tests or a manual verification script.

tasks.title: Show historical targets in Target Entry page
tasks.description: In the target entry page, display the target values from the previous two years for each KPI if they exist in the database.
tasks.verification_method: Manually verify that historical values appear next to the current target inputs for a KPI with existing data.

tasks.title: Refactor annual_targets schema for dynamic targets
tasks.description: Create a new table kpi_annual_target_values to store an arbitrary number of targets per KPI, and migrate existing data from annual_targets.
tasks.verification_method: Verify the new table exists and contains migrated data from annual_target1 and annual_target2.

tasks.title: Update service layer for dynamic targets
tasks.description: Refactor annual.py and repartition.py to handle a dynamic number of targets instead of hardcoded Target 1 and Target 2.
tasks.verification_method: Run existing target tests and verify they pass with the new structure.

tasks.title: Streamlit UI: Dynamic Target Inputs
tasks.description: Update the Streamlit Target Entry page to allow adding/removing targets dynamically for each KPI.
tasks.verification_method: Manually verify in Streamlit that new target rows can be added and values entered.

tasks.title: Streamlit UI: Save/Load Dynamic Targets
tasks.description: Update the save and load logic in Streamlit to correctly handle the new normalized target data structure.
tasks.verification_method: Verify that multiple targets can be saved and reloaded correctly in the UI.

tasks.title: Fix Explorer Tree refresh behavior
tasks.description: Ensure that after creating any hierarchy element (Folder, Group, Subgroup, Indicator), the tree explorer refreshes and resets to its initial root state.
tasks.verification_method: Create a new element and observe the tree view state.

tasks.title: Hierarchical indicator selection in Node Editor
tasks.description: Implement tree-based indicator selection in the Node Editor, matching the structure of KPI management.
tasks.verification_method: Open Node Editor and verify the indicator selection UI is hierarchical.
